name: Project Synthesis Grid
description: Consolidated evaluation across all 5 axes. Completed during Atelier 4 (Synthesis & Action Planning).

transverse_insights.title: Vision-Execution Alignment
transverse_insights.insight: How well do technical decisions (Axis 2) and roadmap (Axis 5) support the stated vision (Axis 1)?

transverse_insights.title: Technical-UX Coherence
transverse_insights.insight: Does technical debt (Axis 2) prevent UX improvements (Axis 3)? Do technical choices enable product vision?

transverse_insights.title: Team Health & Confidence
transverse_insights.insight: Does team sentiment (Axis 4) align with objective findings (Axes 1-3, 5)? Are concerns well-founded or signal issues?

transverse_insights.title: Roadmap Realism
transverse_insights.insight: Is the roadmap (Axis 5) realistic given technical health (Axis 2) and team capacity (Axis 4)?

important_note: The global score is NOT a success/failure metric. A project with 3.2/5 and a clear action plan is healthier than one with 4.1/5 and no visibility. The value is in the analysis clarity and resulting action plan.
next_steps: Use this synthesis to inform 3-month action plan and stakeholder presentation.
